Package com.kbtu.university.model.user

Class Student

java.lang.Object
com.kbtu.university.model.user.User
com.kbtu.university.model.user.Student
All Implemented Interfaces:
NewsObserver, Serializable
public class Student extends User implements NewsObserver
Bachelor student. Registers for courses subject to a credit limit, collects marks, may receive news, and from the 4th year on can be assigned a research supervisor whose h-index must meet a minimum threshold.
See Also:
